name: Chicken with Raspberry Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle each fillet with salt and pepper.
2. Spray skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Add butter to the skillet and heat until melted.
4. Sauté chicken breasts for a few minutes on each side until opaque, then set aside and keep warm.
5. In the same skillet, sprinkle scallions and sauté for a few seconds.
6. Add raspberry vinegar and water, stirring well to loosen all cooking residue.
7. Cook for one minute, then return the chicken breasts to the pan.
8. Continue to cook until done (another few minutes), turning once.
9. Serve immediately with sauce.
